---
title: "Simulating Data for Training Pre-Service Teachers in Classroom Assessment"
author: "Principal Investigator: Michael A. Seaman"
format: 
  typst:
    papersize: us-letter
    theme: theme.scss
    css: theme.scss
    margin: 
      x: 0.5in
      y: 0.5in
    fontsize: 11pt
editor: visual
---

Research Type: Applied

Budget Requested: \$15,000

Area: AI Education

Summary: *write a few sentences about what we will do and how we will implement it*

{{< pagebreak >}}

## Narrative
